sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98441" key="su/mmic" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σύμμιξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιγος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">συμμιγής</foreign> Hdn.Gr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0638.tlg001:1:525" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.525</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
